evals.prompt: We're launching a new SaaS product for fintech automation. We need a complete brand identity system including logo (something modern and tech-focused), brand guidelines, and a color palette that conveys trust and innovation. What should we start with?
evals.expected_output: Complete brand strategy with logo variations, color psychology explanation, typography recommendations, and brand voice framework

evals.prompt: Build me a responsive landing page component library with shadcn/ui and Tailwind. We need: hero section, feature cards, testimonials, pricing table, and a footer. Make it accessible and support dark mode.
evals.expected_output: React components with full code, responsive layouts (mobile/tablet/desktop), accessible ARIA patterns, dark mode CSS variables

evals.prompt: Create 5 social media banner designs for Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter promoting our AI automation course. Include variations for different messaging angles (ROI, ease-of-use, case studies). Sizes should be platform-optimized.
evals.expected_output: Banner designs at exact platform dimensions, multiple design variations, color-coded for different messaging, exported as high-res images
